theme: DM Us To Start Your Brief

linkedin.text:
Forget the 40-page RFP. We can start with two words from you.

Destination idea. Headcount. That's the whole brief we need to begin. 💬

From that we'll come back with a realistic direction, a ballpark budget, and the questions actually worth answering next.

We've built 200+ events from briefs that started exactly this loosely. The hardest part of any great event is simply beginning — so let's make that part take 10 seconds.

DM us now with "[Destination] + [number of people]" and we'll take it from there.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

instagram.text:
Your dream trip is two words away from real. ✨

No RFP. No spreadsheet. Just a destination + how many people. That's all we need to come back with a direction and a ballpark budget. 💬

200+ events have started from briefs exactly this loose. The hardest part is simply beginning — so let's make it take 10 seconds.

💬 Save this and tag the HR lead sitting on a "we should do that trip" idea.
🔗 Link in bio, or just send us a DM.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #TeamBuilding #LuxuryTravel #EventPlanning #WorkPerks #CompanyCulture

facebook.text:
Here's a little secret about how the best events get made: almost none of them started with a finished plan. 💬

Most began with a single loose message — a destination someone had in mind, and a rough number of people. That's it.

From two words like that, we've built 200+ events across 120+ countries. We take the loose idea and hand back a realistic direction, a ballpark budget, and the questions worth tackling next.

The hardest part of any great event is simply beginning. So let's make beginning take 10 seconds.

Send us a message with your destination idea and headcount, and we'll take it from there.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #MICE #EventDesign

image_prompt: Drone shot looking straight down on a huge crowd of corporate guests mingling at an evening reception across a Mediterranean piazza, hundreds of tiny figures from directly above scattered around glowing cocktail stations and long banquet tables, warm pools of light on dark stone paving. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
